person.name: MD Mahmudun Nur Miraz
person.summary: Recent Computer Science graduate with hands-on experience building full-stack web applications using React, JavaScript, TypeScript, FastAPI, Flask, Node.js, and REST APIs.
person.about: Recent Computer Science graduate with hands-on experience building full-stack web applications using React, JavaScript, TypeScript, FastAPI, Flask, Node.js, and REST APIs. Strong foundation in databases, backend development, and modular system design, with practical experience in API integration, debugging, and building maintainable applications. Comfortable working with PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, and SQLite, and eager to contribute to real-world software projects while continuously learning modern technologies.

whatIDo.title: Full-Stack Development
whatIDo.description: I enjoy building complete web applications from the ground up — designing REST APIs, structuring databases, and crafting clean, responsive frontends. There's something satisfying about seeing all the layers work together.

whatIDo.title: AI/ML Research & Experimentation
whatIDo.description: I like exploring how AI systems reason and learn. From face recognition pipelines to language model distillation, I enjoy working on problems where the solution isn't obvious yet.

whatIDo.title: Clean, Maintainable Code
whatIDo.description: I care about writing code that others (and future me) can actually read. Modular design, clear separation of concerns, and good debugging habits are things I actively practice.

research.title: Tree-of-Thought Distillation for Small Language Models
points: Generated reasoning traces using structured branching and pruning techniques
Built datasets from reasoning paths and fine-tuned smaller models
Evaluated model performance for reasoning-based tasks

projects.title: QuickHire — Full-Stack Job Board Platform
points: Designed and developed a scalable full-stack job platform with dynamic job browsing and application features
Built RESTful APIs using Express and MongoDB with structured data models
Implemented search and filtering with optimized query handling
Developed an admin dashboard for managing jobs and user activity
Applied modular architecture and reusable component design

projects.title: Face Detection System — Real-Time Face Recognition Platform
points: Built a full-stack face recognition and presence detection system with real-time verification and gesture detection
Developed backend services using FastAPI for person management, face enrollment, and verification
Designed relational database models using PostgreSQL and SQLAlchemy
Integrated DeepFace for face recognition and MediaPipe for gesture analysis
Built a React frontend for live camera detection, dashboard monitoring, and enrollment workflows

projects.title: Bashpo — Online Game Marketplace
points: Developed a backend-driven marketplace using Flask with authentication and role-based authorization
Implemented product listing, purchasing workflow, and user management
Designed and maintained a relational database schema using SQLite
Structured the application with clean separation of responsibilities

projects.title: Weather Forecast Web Application
points: Built a real-time weather application with API integration and dynamic UI updates
Structured the application using reusable React components and state management
Managed environment variables and applied basic API security practices

education.title: BRAC University — BSc in Computer Science

certifications.title: IELTS
certifications.detail: Overall Band 7.0 — Reading: 7.5, Listening: 7.5, Speaking: 7.0, Writing: 6.0

experience.title: Transcriber & Translator — CS50 (Harvard)
experience.desc: Transcribed and translated technical lectures, improving attention to detail and technical understanding.

experience.title: Private Tutor (Math, Science, Programming, IELTS)
experience.desc: Taught programming fundamentals, problem-solving, and logical thinking. Strengthened communication and ability to explain complex concepts clearly.
